name: Weather-Aware Booking
description: Branches on weather-API forecast to offer reschedule vs. confirm.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — no pressure at all, but the forecast looks rough for your visit on {{bookingStartsAt}}. Want us to move it to a drier day so the trip in is easier? Reply YES and we'll find a time that works.

args.subject: You're all set — Bright Smile Dental sees you on {{bookingStartsAt}}
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

You're confirmed for your visit at Bright Smile Dental on {{bookingStartsAt}} — and the forecast is looking friendly, so the trip in should be easy.

If anything comes up, just reply to this email and we'll sort it out, no pressure. We're looking forward to making this the most relaxed dental visit you've had in a while.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
